column11: Message

room.pci-disclaimer
room.join
你好
Hi! This is Tom. Is there anything I can help you with?
I would like to obtain a personal phone number that will allow me to make voice calls to my clients in Chinese Mainland
https://www.m800.com/
Please try to purchase the number via our website.
Thanks
OK
Could you provide me with a number so I can test it out for free?
Sorry, we couldn't assign any numbers before the verification
What is the difference between a local direct dial number (DID) and a free phone call, and what are their respective functions?
DID calls are used for both inbound and outbound using IDD operators route. Tollfree are only for inbound and can only be reached in the country.

Alright. What I need is a DID phone number. However, when selecting a local direct dial number (DID) for purchase, under the additional filtering options, I chose the following options: Call and Dial (Local Line). But the system did not match me with the corresponding phone number. How can I resolve this issue? Thank you
Let me check with the team and getback to you.
Do you prefer to communicate through the chat or email?
Alright, thank you! I hope to receive your response soon
I still prefer chatting and communicating, as it’s more efficient.
You can also communicate with me via Telegram. My Telegram handle is: @nadro2025.
E-mail:lishiman2025@outlook.com
Noted, will get back to you once got update.
Alright, thank you!
hello
Hi, we have forwarded the issue to the sales, and he will get back to you.
thank
I will close this inquiry first, since the sales will follow up.
room.leave
enquiry.terminate
